title: Verilog generate with decrement downto 0 causes yosys to hang

features.name: generate for loop with genvar decrement downto zero
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop using a genvar that decrements down to zero with condition i >= 0

features.name: generate loop with >= comparison on decrementing counter
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop with decrement where the loop condition uses >= 0 rather than > 0
